drivers.notes: Anodised aluminium cone with X-PAL geometry

description.en: 3-way Persona floorstander — Truextent pure-beryllium tweeter and midrange paired with twin 178 mm X-PAL aluminium woofers in a faceted ported cabinet. Crossovers at 450 Hz / 2.4 kHz; 89 dB anechoic sensitivity.
description.es: Floorstander Persona de tres vías — tweeter y midrange Truextent en berilio puro junto a dos woofers de 178 mm en aluminio X-PAL, en un gabinete facetado con puerto. Crossovers a 450 Hz / 2,4 kHz; 89 dB de sensibilidad anecoica.
